eval_dimensions.name: Request-Review Gate Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: The skill resolves the request_review gate before any pre-flight work and branches on effect: ask fires the Stand-by AskUserQuestion widget; auto-advance proceeds to pre-flight; skip requests no review (solo-maintainer / no-review posture). Session policy is never re-derived from friction_level/active_modes in prose (ADR-0016).

eval_dimensions.name: Human-Approval Short-Circuit with Bot Filtering
eval_dimensions.description: When a human APPROVED review matches the current headRefOid, the skill fires AskUserQuestion (skip already-approved / force / cancel). Bot approvals (login ending in [bot], author.type==Bot) are filtered first and MUST NOT short-circuit human review (GH-993, GH-128).

eval_dimensions.name: Draft-State Guard
eval_dimensions.description: GitHub silently drops review requests on draft PRs. The skill checks isDraft and runs gh pr ready before requesting when the PR is draft (GH-851 F7).

eval_dimensions.name: Reviewer Resolution via MCP Tool
eval_dimensions.description: Reviewers resolve from explicit args, then per-project config (skip / standby / reviewers), then ask. The review request is issued via the request_review MCP tool, never a raw gh api call.

eval_dimensions.name: Defer Records review-deferred Mode
eval_dimensions.description: Choosing Stand-by / defer records review-deferred in active_modes so verify-acc-dod skips the 'Review requested' check, and returns cleanly without requesting review (GH-396).

evals.name: request_review gate resolves before pre-flight
evals.description: resolve_gate(request_review) is the first action; pre-flight checks and reviewer resolution do not run before it resolves.

assertions.signal: resolve_gate(gate="request_review") is called before pre-flight or reviewer resolution

evals.name: skip effect requests no review
evals.description: When the gate resolves to skip (solo-maintainer / no-review), the skill prints the skip notice and stops — request_review is not called.

assertions.signal: skip effect → request_review MCP tool is NOT called; skill prints 'Skipping review request'

evals.name: ask effect fires the Stand-by widget
evals.description: When the gate resolves to ask, the skill fires the Stand-by AskUserQuestion widget (Request now / Stand-by self-review / Skip) before doing anything else.

assertions.signal: ask effect fires AskUserQuestion Stand-by widget before pre-flight
No inline plain-text 'request review now?' substitutes for the widget

evals.name: Human approval on current HEAD short-circuits
evals.description: A human APPROVED review with commit.oid == headRefOid fires AskUserQuestion (Skip already-approved / Force / Cancel) instead of spamming a redundant request.

assertions.signal: Human APPROVED on headRefOid fires AskUserQuestion with a Recommended 'Skip — already approved' option

evals.name: Bot approvals never short-circuit human review
evals.description: When the only approvals on the current HEAD are from bots ([bot] login / author.type==Bot), the PR is treated as unapproved by humans and the skill proceeds to request human review.

assertions.signal: A bot-only approval does NOT trigger the short-circuit AskUserQuestion; the skill proceeds to request human review

evals.name: Draft PR is marked ready before requesting
evals.description: When isDraft is true, the skill runs gh pr ready before requesting review so the request is not silently lost.

assertions.signal: isDraft=true → gh pr ready is run before request_review is called

evals.name: Review requested via the request_review MCP tool
evals.description: When reviewers resolve, the request is issued through the request_review MCP tool, not a raw gh api call.

assertions.signal: Review is requested via mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__request_review, not raw gh api
config skip:true → no request; standby:true → defer without a raw gh api request

evals.name: Stand-by / defer records review-deferred
evals.description: Choosing Stand-by / defer appends review-deferred to active_modes and returns cleanly without requesting review.

assertions.signal: Stand-by / defer appends review-deferred to active_modes and does not call request_review

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-request-review skill

should_trigger.rationale: Direct invocation — resolves the gate and requests review

should_trigger.query: the PR is ready, request review from the backend team

should_trigger.rationale: Reviewer assignment — the core use case

should_not_trigger.query: the PR is still a work in progress
should_not_trigger.rationale: Draft/WIP — do not request review yet
